scenarios.name: reporter_recreates_missing_queue_and_state
scenarios.inject: 删除 report-queue.json 和 reporter-state.json，再运行 reporter

scenarios.name: sender_dedupes_duplicate_queue_entries
scenarios.inject: 向队列写入完全重复的两条消息，验证 sender 处理后只保留一个活跃项

scenarios.name: sync_prefers_success_over_pending_conflict
scenarios.inject: 同时放入 pending 和 success 两种 attempt，验证 terminal sync 选择 success 作为更强终态

scenarios.name: runner_missing_task_file_is_controlled
scenarios.inject: 删除 current-task.json 再运行 runner，验证不会崩溃且记录 missing_task_file

scenarios.name: reconcile_clears_queue_on_real_success_observation
scenarios.inject: 给 pending confirmation 注入真实 success observation，验证 reconcile 收口并清队列
